'''lazhongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemni|zemni]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemni|zemni]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lazhongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzhengeth|læzhengeth]] || [[word:læzhengej|læzhengej]] || [[word:læzhengesh|læzhengesh]] || [[word:læzhenge|læzhenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazhozhongoth|lazhozhongoth]] || [[word:lazhozhongoj|lazhozhongoj]] || [[word:lazhozhongosh|lazhozhongosh]] || [[word:lazhozhongo|lazhozhongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazhongoth|lazhongoth]] || [[word:lazhongoj|lazhongoj]] || [[word:lazhongosh|lazhongosh]] || [[word:lazhongo|lazhongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazhofngoth|lazhofngoth]] || [[word:lazhofngoj|lazhofngoj]] || [[word:lazhofngosh|lazhofngosh]] || [[word:lazhofngof|lazhofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazhongotho|lazhongotho]] || [[word:lazhongojo|lazhongojo]] || [[word:lazhongosho|lazhongosho]] || [[word:lazhongoko|lazhongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazhongoth|lazhongoth]] || [[word:lazhongoj|lazhongoj]] || [[word:lazhongosh|lazhongosh]] || [[word:lazhongo|lazhongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazhongothol|lazhongothol]] || [[word:lazhongojol|lazhongojol]] || [[word:lazhongoshol|lazhongoshol]] || [[word:lazhongokol|lazhongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazhongothotho|lazhongothotho]] || [[word:lazhongojojo|lazhongojojo]] || [[word:lazhongoshosho|lazhongoshosho]] || [[word:lazhongoko|lazhongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazhongothon|lazhongothon]] || [[word:lazhongojon|lazhongojon]] || [[word:lazhongoshon|lazhongoshon]] || [[word:lazhongokon|lazhongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazhongothoro|lazhongothoro]] || [[word:lazhongojoro|lazhongojoro]] || [[word:lazhongoshoro|lazhongoshoro]] || [[word:lazhongokoro|lazhongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
